activities.name: Copy AAD Users
activities.description: Calls the Entra ID and retrieves a list of the users and their attributes

typeProperties.message: failing the pipeline as previous activities are failed.

activities.name: Send horizon to odw data load failed
Record completed horizon to odw data lode

ErrorMessage.value:
@trim(
  replace(
    concat(
      coalesce(activity('Record horizon to odw data loading')?.Error?.message, ''),
      ' | ',
      coalesce(activity('Lookup_orchestration_file')?.Error?.message, ''),
      ' | ',
      coalesce(activity('Filter_Horizon_Table')?.Error?.message, ''),
      ' | ',
      coalesce(activity('Horizon Raw to Std')?.Error?.message, ''),
      ' | ',
      coalesce(activity('Filter_Harmonised_NoteBook')?.Error?.message, ''),
      if(
        not(equals(length(variables('HrmNotebookErrorArray')), 0)),
        ' | horizon Harmonised NoteBook Failed check App Insights for details',
        ''
      )
    ),
    '|',
    ''
  )
)

StatusMessage.value:
@if(
    and(
        equals(
            trim(
                concat(
                    coalesce(activity('Record horizon to odw data loading')?.Error?.message, ''),
                    coalesce(activity('Lookup_orchestration_file')?.Error?.message, ''),
                    coalesce(activity('Filter_Horizon_Table')?.Error?.message, ''),
                    coalesce(activity('Horizon Raw to Std')?.Error?.message, ''),
                    coalesce(activity('Filter_Harmonised_NoteBook')?.Error?.message, '')
                )
            ),
            ''
        ),
        equals(length(variables('HrmNotebookErrorArray')), 0)
    ),
    'horizon To Odw load Successfully Completed',
    'horizon To Odw Failed')
